title: Vortexa Freight Weekly
summary:
Main
By Dylan Simpson
ANALYSIS / EAST OF SUEZ / DIRTY
Aframaxes leave Suezmaxes in the dust ex-Russia
Crude utilisation out of Russia per vessel class
Russian exports ended April almost 10% up m-o-m, mostly headed towards India and East Asia. At the same time, crude tonne-miles out of Russia continue to breach record highs. Aframax tankers have mostly benefited from this, with the majority of flows originating out of the Baltic.
